detected_signals: multiple reviews mention being unable to get through on the phone to book
website explicitly says no online booking, call only
p_bright.reasoning: Owner-operated single clinic, in review range, clear phone-booking friction and no online booking — strong fit for appointment-booking SaaS.
p_bright.suggested_opener: Noticed a couple of your Google reviews mention trouble getting through on the phone to book — we help clinics like Bright Smile take bookings online so those calls don't get lost.
p_bright.opener_call: Noticed a couple of your Google reviews mention trouble getting through on the phone to book — we help clinics take bookings online so those calls don't get lost.
p_bright.opener_email: I came across Bright Smile and noticed several reviews mention patients being unable to reach you by phone to book appointments. We help clinics move those bookings online — happy to show you how it works if useful.
p_bright.opener_whatsapp: Hi! Saw some of your reviews mention trouble booking by phone — we help clinics like yours take bookings online. Worth a quick chat?

p_cityhosp.opener_call: Noticed you are already using Practo for online booking — likely not a fit for us right now, but wanted to check.
p_cityhosp.opener_email: I noticed City Hospital already uses Practo for online bookings — you are likely sorted on that front, so this may not be relevant right now.
p_cityhosp.opener_whatsapp: Hi! Saw you already use Practo for bookings — probably not a fit right now, but feel free to reach out if that changes.
